name: Google Flights Search
tagline: Search Google Flights for real-time one-way and round-trip deals
description:
Search Google Flights in real time to find cheap one-way and round-trip flights between any airports worldwide. Filter by stops, airlines, departure/arrival times, price, and seat class. Returns structured flight data including prices, durations, and airline details — ready for comparison or booking.

Powered by the Google Flights Live API on RapidAPI. A free tier with 50 requests/month is available to get started.
